zh.lifeSummary: Johann Peter Schumacher於1634年出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格。他於大約1662年與Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾斯坦澤爾次被列為zimmermann。他去世於1717年12月31日在他的家鄉享年83歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州費拉德爾福亞格曼托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Johann Peter Schumacher于1634年出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格。他于大约1662年与Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾可利布格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾斯坦澤爾次被列为zimmermann。他去世于1717年12月31日在他的家乡享年83岁，埋葬在美国宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞格曼托。

nameMeanings.name: Schumacher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Bernd, Klaus, Alois, Erwin, Fritz, Horst, Juergen, Bernhard, Ewald.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a shoemaker, from Middle High German schuoch ‘shoe’, German Schuh + an agent derivative of machen ‘to make’. This surname is also found in Denmark and Sweden.

variants.name: Schuhmacher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Inge, Juergen.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Schumacher  .

variants.name: Shumake
meanings: Altered form of German Schumach, a variant of Schumacher .

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.

en.lifeSummary: Johann Peter Schumacher was born in 1634, in Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. He married Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks about 1662, in Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as zimmermann in Steinseltz, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. He died on 31 December 1717, in his hometown, at the age of 83, and was buried in Germantown, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Johann Peter Schumacher est né en 1634, à Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Il a épousé Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks environ 1662, à Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est zimmermann à Steinseltz, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1717, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Germantown, Philadelphie, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Johann Peter Schumacher wurde 1634 in Kleeburg, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren. Er hat um 1662 in Kleeburg, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als zimmermann in Steinselz, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 31. Dezember 1717 im Alter von 83 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Germantown, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Johann Peter Schumacherは1634年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンクリーボウルグで生まれた。約1662年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンクリーボウルグでAnna Barbara Heckh Hendricksと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。フランスアルサスバス-ルヒンステインセルッツでの職業はzimmermannと記録されている。彼は1717年12月31日に故郷で83歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアジャーマントウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Buck, Drumore Township, Lancaster, Penns: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 랭커스터 드럼어 타운시프 벅
ko.lifeSummary: Johann Peter Schumacher(은)는 1634년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 클리보우르그에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1662년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 클리보우르그에서 Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 스타인셀츠에서 zimmermann이었다. 그는 1717년 12월 31일 그의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 그먼타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Johann Peter Schumacher nasceu em 1634, em Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França. Ele casou-se com Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks aproximadamente 1662, em Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como zimmermann em Steinseltz, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França. Ele faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1717, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Germantown, Filadélfia, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Johann Peter Schumacher родился в 1634 г. в местности клибург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks около 1662 г. в местности клибург, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии zimmermann в местности стинселц, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. Он умер 31 декабря 1717 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности джирмантоун, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Johann Peter Schumacher nació en 1634, en Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Se casó con Anna Barbara Heckh Hendricks aproximadamente 1662, en Cleebourg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era zimmermann en Steinseltz, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Murió el 31 de diciembre de 1717, en su pueblo, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Germantown, Filadelfia, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos.
